name: studio.get_navigation
description: Read the site-wide navigation (header, footer, menus) for an Actium Studio site.
whenToUse: Pre-edit read before calling update_navigation: agents should operate on the current menu state, not guess.
Audit IA (information architecture): enumerate menu entries across header and footer for a consistency check.
Resolve whether a target page is already linked from navigation before adding a redundant entry.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants to modify navigation — this is read-only; use update_navigation for writes.
Caller wants the rendered DOM or HTML of the navigation — this returns structured menu data, not markup.
Caller wants per-page in-body links — those live inside page content (get_page), not navigation.
